title: Green Computing Power Management Algorithm
description: Algorithm for implementing power saving states on computing devices
code:
// Power Management Algorithm
BEGIN
 SET idleThreshold = 5 minutes
 SET sleepTimeout = 15 minutes
 
 FUNCTION monitorActivity()
 WHILE systemIsOn
 idleTime = getIdleTime()
 
 IF idleTime >= sleepTimeout THEN
 enterHibernateMode()
 ELSE IF idleTime >= idleThreshold THEN
 enterSleepMode()
 END IF
 
 delay(30 seconds)
 END WHILE
 END FUNCTION
 
 // Energy-efficient scheduling
 FUNCTION scheduleTasks()
 tasks = getPendingTasks()
 currentLoad = getSystemLoad()
 
 FOR EACH task IN tasks
 IF isFlexible(task) AND currentLoad < peakThreshold THEN
 execute(task)
 currentLoad = currentLoad + task.load
 ELSE
 defer(task)
 END IF
 END FOR
 END FUNCTION
END
explanation: This algorithm demonstrates power management through automatic sleep/hibernate modes based on user inactivity and intelligent task scheduling during low-peak hours to optimize energy consumption.

title: Virtual Machine Consolidation Algorithm
description: Algorithm to optimize VM placement for energy efficiency
code:
// VM Consolidation Algorithm
BEGIN
 CONST MAX_VMS_PER_SERVER = 50
 CONST CPU_THRESHOLD = 80
 CONST MEMORY_THRESHOLD = 85
 
 FUNCTION consolidateVMs(servers, vms)
 // Sort servers by utilization
 sortedServers = sortByUtilization(servers, DESCENDING)
 
 FOR EACH vm IN vms
 FOR EACH server IN sortedServers
 IF canMigrate(vm, server) THEN
 migrate(vm, server)
 BREAK
 END IF
 END FOR
 END FOR
 
 // Power off underutilized servers
 FOR EACH server IN servers
 utilization = getUtilization(server)
 IF utilization < 20 THEN
 migrateAllVMs(server)
 powerOff(server)
 END IF
 END FOR
 END FUNCTION
END
explanation: This algorithm consolidates VMs onto fewer servers to improve utilization and powers off idle servers, reducing overall energy consumption in the data center.

title: Green Data Center Monitoring
description: Algorithm for continuous monitoring and optimization of data center energy efficiency
code:
// Data Center Energy Monitor
BEGIN
 SET PUE_TARGET = 1.3
 
 FUNCTION monitorDataCenter()
 WHILE monitoringActive
 // Collect metrics
 totalPower = readPowerMeters()
 itPower = readITPowerMeters()
 temperature = readSensors()
 
 // Calculate PUE
 currentPUE = totalPower / itPower
 
 // Optimize cooling if PUE above target
 IF currentPUE > PUE_TARGET THEN
 adjustCooling(temperature)
 checkFreeCooling()
 END IF
 
 // Log and alert
 logMetrics(currentPUE, totalPower, itPower)
 IF currentPUE > PUE_TARGET * 1.2 THEN
 sendAlert("High PUE detected")
 END IF
 
 delay(60 seconds)
 END WHILE
 END FUNCTION
 
 FUNCTION checkFreeCooling()
 outdoorTemp = getOutdoorTemperature()
 IF outdoorTemp < roomTemp - 5 THEN
 enableFreeCooling()
 ELSE
 disableFreeCooling()
 END IF
 END FUNCTION
END
explanation: This monitoring system continuously tracks PUE and adjusts cooling systems automatically, including enabling free cooling when outdoor conditions permit.
